sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْهَاتِفُ الذَّكِيُّ جُزْءًا هَامًّا فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefon se smatra važnim dijelom našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: The smartphone is considered an important part of our daily life.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةَ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove uređaje koristimo za komunikaciju s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: We use these devices to communicate with friends and family.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا نَسْتَطِيعُ أَيْضًا تَحْمِيلَ تَطْبِيقَاتٍ مُفِيدَةٍ لِلتَّعَلُّمِ وَالتَّرْفِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Također možemo preuzeti i korisne aplikacije za učenje i zabavu.
sentences.translationEn: We can also download useful applications for learning and entertainment.
